title: Sour Chewy Saudia Lime Crumble
description: This vegetarian-friendly crumble features unwaxed limes and is a crowd-pleaser for breakfast or dessert.
instructions: Wash and dry the limes thoroughly, removing any visible wax. Cut them into wedges.
In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, cane sugar, flour, oil, and nutmeg powder. Mix until well combined.
Fold in lime wedges to create a crumbly mixture. Press it firmly between your fingers to make smaller crumbles if needed.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Line a baking dish with parchment paper.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the lined dish. Bake for about 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
